commands: cd /root && python3 -m pip install --quiet openai tiktoken anthropic

python3 -c "import gcsfs; fs = gcsfs.GCSFileSystem(token='anon'); fs.get('benchmarking_tasks_repos/BTAD_URD/paper.pdf', '/home/agent/paper.pdf')" || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download paper.pdf from GCS'; exit 1; }

python3 -c "import gcsfs; fs = gcsfs.GCSFileSystem(token='anon'); fs.get('benchmarking_tasks_repos/BTAD_URD/repo.zip', '/home/agent/repo.zip')" || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download repo.zip from GCS'; exit 1; }

python3 -c "import gcsfs; fs = gcsfs.GCSFileSystem(token='anon'); fs.get('benchmarking_tasks_repos/BTAD_URD/dataset.zip', '/home/agent/dataset.xz')" || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to download dataset.zip from GCS'; exit 1; }
unzip -q repo.zip -d solution_repo || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to extract repo.zip'; exit 1; }
xz -dc dataset.xz | tar -xf - -C dataset/ || { echo 'ERROR: Failed to extract dataset'; exit 1; }
